latin: Imperator, qui mox gladiator factus est, militibus suis ante proelium dixit: 'quod in vita facimus in aeternum resonat.'

questions.target: A general who will become a gladiator
choices: A general who will become a gladiator

questions.prompt: What is the meaning of his words?
questions.target: Our actions in life have eternal consequences
choices: Our actions in life have eternal consequences
Death is the end of all things

translation: The general, who would soon become a gladiator, said to his soldiers before battle: 'What we do in life echoes in eternity.'
